releases.summary: GIF search in chat runs through the channel backend so lookups stay reliable and secure.

improvements: GIF picker: search and trending load through the same channel backend as movie tools, instead of a shared key baked into the page.
GIF picker: no more pasting your own Giphy API key in the browser — the channel worker handles it.
breaking: Action required (channel operators): deploy the movies-storage worker with a GIPHY_API_KEY secret so GIF search keeps working after you update channel JavaScript to this release.
deprecations: Per-browser Giphy API key overrides in localStorage are no longer used.

highlights: GIF search and trending run through the channel backend, like movie lookups.
No Giphy API key is shipped in channel JavaScript anymore.
Channel operators: set GIPHY_API_KEY on the worker when updating to this release.

releases.summary: Save your own look in Theme Settings and a chat sidebar that sits cleaner beside the video.

features: Theme Settings: save named color and font presets in your browser, layered on the channel default, and they come back when you return.
improvements: Chat column: sits flush against the video divider with a softer glass panel instead of a boxed-in sidebar.
Personalize appearance from Theme Settings instead of Channel Settings, so you do not need mod access to tune your view.

highlights: Theme Settings: save and load your own color and font presets in this browser.
Chat sits flush against the video with a cleaner, softer sidebar look.
Personalize the channel look from Theme Settings—no channel mod permissions needed.

releases.summary: A cleaner sidebar, smarter movie requests with search and chat announcements, and smoother add-media and movie tools.

features: Movie requests: search with genre, year, minimum rating, and sort order, then page through results to find the right title.
Movie requests: confirming a pick posts an announcement in chat so everyone sees who suggested what.
improvements: Left column modules: Message of the Day, playlist, and polls now appear as separate glass cards instead of one nested box.
Channel look: fewer heavy borders across the stack, playlist, polls, chat tools, and modals for a more unified glass style.
Polls panel: the empty poll area stays hidden until you start or join a poll, so the sidebar looks tidier when nothing is active.
Mods: Edit MOTD and New Poll sit in each panel header for quicker access.
Account menu: click your avatar in the top bar to open account options directly.
Movie request modal: Yes/No confirmation before submitting, cleaner header spacing, and a scrollable list of recent channel requests.
Add media: titles can include spaces when adding from a URL, and links with spaces queue correctly.
Movie tools: !summary, !cast, ratings, subtitles, and movie info load through the channel backend instead of a TMDB key in channel settings.
fixes: Theme loading: fixed a freeze that could leave the channel stuck on the BillTube loading screen when the theme starts.
breaking: Action required: channel staff need to update Custom JavaScript with the latest @v1.6.0 CDN pin so viewers get movie request, layout, and movie-tool updates.
deprecations: Custom embed tab: removed from add media — use the standard URL or file tabs instead.
TMDB API key in theme settings no longer powers movie lookups; the backend worker handles them.

highlights: Movie requests: filter and page through search results by genre, year, rating, and sort.
Confirming a movie request announces it in chat for the whole room.
Movie request modal: Yes/No confirm and recent channel requests in one place.
Add-from-URL titles can use spaces; links with spaces queue correctly.
Left column: MOTD, playlist, and polls are separate glass cards with clearer spacing.
Movie tools load through the channel backend — no TMDB key in channel JavaScript.
Poll panel hides when no poll is running, so the sidebar stays clean.
Fixed a loading freeze when enabling the BillTube theme.

releases.summary: Connected-user tooltip stays on screen in the chat bar.
highlights: Connected users breakdown: hovering the user count in the chat bar keeps the full tooltip visible instead of clipping off the edge of the screen.
User count display shows only the number again instead of the long admin breakdown string.

releases.summary: Movie suggestions and audio tools are more reliable.
highlights: Movie suggestions no longer show invalid or empty entries.
Audio enhancer loads correctly when the channel starts.
